en: "Moreover, you shall make the tabernacle with ten curtains of fine twined linen and blue and purple and scarlet yarns; you shall make them with cherubim skillfully worked into them.
zh: “你要用十幅幔子來做會幕；幔子要用撚的細麻、藍色紫色朱紅色線做成，並要用巧工繡上基路伯。

en: The length of each curtain shall be twenty-eight cubits, and the breadth of each curtain four cubits; all the curtains shall be the same size.
zh: 每幅幔子要長十二公尺，寬兩公尺，每幅幔子都要一樣的尺寸。

en: Five curtains shall be coupled to one another, and the other five curtains shall be coupled to one another.
zh: 其中五幅幔子要彼此相連，另外五幅幔子也要彼此相連。

en: And you shall make loops of blue on the edge of the outermost curtain in the first set. Likewise you shall make loops on the edge of the outermost curtain in the second set.
zh: 其中一組相連的幔子最後一幅的邊上，你要做藍色的鈕扣；在另一組相連的幔子最後一幅的邊上，你也要這樣做。

en: Fifty loops you shall make on the one curtain, and fifty loops you shall make on the edge of the curtain that is in the second set; the loops shall be opposite one another.
zh: 在這幅幔子上，你要做五十個鈕扣；在另一組幔子最後一幅的邊上，你也要做五十個鈕扣，這些鈕扣要彼此相對。

en: And you shall make fifty clasps of gold, and couple the curtains one to the other with the clasps, so that the tabernacle may be a single whole.
zh: 你要做五十個金鉤，又要用鉤使幔子相連起來，成為一整個會幕。

en: "You shall also make curtains of goats' hair for a tent over the tabernacle; eleven curtains shall you make.
zh: “你要用山羊毛做幔子，作會幕上面的帳棚，你要做十一幅幔子。

en: The length of each curtain shall be thirty cubits, and the breadth of each curtain four cubits. The eleven curtains shall be the same size.
zh: 每幅幔子要長十三公尺，寬兩公尺，十一幅幔子都要一樣的尺寸。

en: You shall couple five curtains by themselves, and six curtains by themselves, and the sixth curtain you shall double over at the front of the tent.
zh: 你要把五幅幔子連在一起，又把另外六幅幔子連在一起，你要在帳棚前面把第六幅幔子摺疊起來。

en: You shall make fifty loops on the edge of the curtain that is outermost in one set, and fifty loops on the edge of the curtain that is outermost in the second set.
zh: 在這一組相連的幔子最後一幅的邊上，你要做五十個鈕扣；在另一組相連的幔子最後一幅的邊上，也要做五十個鈕扣。

en: "You shall make fifty clasps of bronze, and put the clasps into the loops, and couple the tent together that it may be a single whole.
zh: 你又要做五十個銅鉤，把鉤穿進鈕扣中，使帳棚連起來，成為一整個帳棚。

en: And the part that remains of the curtains of the tent, the half curtain that remains, shall hang over the back of the tabernacle.
zh: 帳棚的幔子多出的那部分，即垂下來的半幅幔子，要垂在會幕的後面。

en: And the extra that remains in the length of the curtains, the cubit on the one side, and the cubit on the other side, shall hang over the sides of the tabernacle, on this side and that side, to cover it.
zh: 帳棚幔子多出的長度，要這邊五十公分，那邊五十公分，並且要在會幕的兩邊，遮蓋會幕。

en: And you shall make for the tent a covering of tanned rams' skins and a covering of goatskins on top.
zh: 你又要用染紅的公羊皮做帳棚的頂蓋，在上面再蓋上海狗皮。

en: "You shall make upright frames for the tabernacle of acacia wood.
zh: “你要用皂莢木做會幕的豎板，

en: Ten cubits shall be the length of a frame, and a cubit and a half the breadth of each frame.
zh: 每塊板要長四公尺，寬六十六公分。

en: There shall be two tenons in each frame, for fitting together. So shall you do for all the frames of the tabernacle.
zh: 每塊木板要有兩個榫頭，彼此連接，會幕的一切木板你都要這樣做。

en: You shall make the frames for the tabernacle: twenty frames for the south side;
zh: 你要給會幕做木板；給南邊，就是向南的一面，做二十塊木板，

en: and forty bases of silver you shall make under the twenty frames, two bases under one frame for its two tenons, and two bases under the next frame for its two tenons;
zh: 在這二十塊板底下，你要做四十個銀插座；每塊木板底下有兩個插座連接它的兩個榫頭。

en: and for the second side of the tabernacle, on the north side twenty frames,
zh: 你也要給會幕的另一邊，就是北面，做二十塊木板，

en: and their forty bases of silver, two bases under one frame, and two bases under the next frame.
zh: 和四十個銀插座。這塊木板底下有兩個插座，那塊木板底下也有兩個插座。

en: And for the rear of the tabernacle westward you shall make six frames.
zh: 給會幕的後面，就是西面，你要做六塊木板。

en: And you shall make two frames for corners of the tabernacle in the rear;
zh: 在會幕後面的兩角上，你要做兩塊木板。

en: they shall be separate beneath, but joined at the top, at the first ring. Thus shall it be with both of them; they shall form the two corners.
zh: 木板的下截是要雙的，一直連到上面的第一環那裡，都是要雙的。兩塊都要這樣做，要成為兩隻角。

en: And there shall be eight frames, with their bases of silver, sixteen bases; two bases under one frame, and two bases under another frame.
zh: 所以要有八塊木板，和十六個銀插座，這塊木板底下有兩個插座，那塊木板底下也有兩個插座。

en: "You shall make bars of acacia wood, five for the frames of the one side of the tabernacle,
zh: “你要用皂莢木做橫閂，為會幕這邊的木板做五個橫閂，

en: and five bars for the frames of the other side of the tabernacle, and five bars for the frames of the side of the tabernacle at the rear westward.
zh: 為會幕那邊的木板也做五個橫閂，又為會幕的後邊，即西邊的木板，也做五個橫閂。

en: The middle bar, halfway up the frames, shall run from end to end.
zh: 木板中部的中閂，要從這一端通到那一端，

en: You shall overlay the frames with gold and shall make their rings of gold for holders for the bars, and you shall overlay the bars with gold.
zh: 木板要包金，你也要做板上的金環，用來穿上橫閂，橫閂也要包金。

en: Then you shall erect the tabernacle according to the plan for it that you were shown on the mountain.
zh: 你要照著在山上指示你的樣式立起會幕。

en: "And you shall make a veil of blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen. It shall be made with cherubim skillfully worked into it.
zh: “你要用藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻做幔幕，並且要用巧工繡上基路伯。

en: And you shall hang it on four pillars of acacia overlaid with gold, with hooks of gold, on four bases of silver.
zh: 你要把幔幕掛在四根包金的皂莢木柱子上，柱上有金鉤，柱腳安在四個銀插座上。

en: And you shall hang the veil from the clasps, and bring the ark of the testimony in there within the veil. And the veil shall separate for you the Holy Place from the Most Holy.
zh: 你要把幔幕掛在鉤子上，把法櫃抬進幔幕裡面，這幔幕要給你們把聖所和至聖所分開。

en: You shall put the mercy seat on the ark of the testimony in the Most Holy Place.
zh: 你要把施恩座安在至聖所內的法櫃上。

en: And you shall set the table outside the veil, and the lampstand on the south side of the tabernacle opposite the table, and you shall put the table on the north side.
zh: 你要把桌子放在幔幕外，把燈臺放在會幕的南邊，與桌子相對；把桌子安在北面。

en: "You shall make a screen for the entrance of the tent, of blue and purple and scarlet yarns and fine twined linen, embroidered with needlework.
zh: “你要給帳幕的門口做塊簾子，要用藍色紫色朱紅色線和撚的細麻編織而成。

en: And you shall make for the screen five pillars of acacia, and overlay them with gold. Their hooks shall be of gold, and you shall cast five bases of bronze for them.
zh: 你又要用皂莢木為簾子做五根柱子，柱子要包金，柱上有金鉤，你也要為柱腳鑄造五個銅插座。”
